## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the security gap, operational pain, or missing capability. -->

<!-- How would you implement it? Which module(s) would be affected? -->

## Alternatives considered

## Security impact

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] No, I'm requesting it for someone else to implement
